content.fact: For most of Year 4, Barty Crouch Jr. successfully impersonates Moody and manipulates events while the real Moody is imprisoned.
content.injection: Before the fake Moody reveal, write Moody as apparently Moody to Harry and school observers; do not expose Barty Crouch Jr., the Polyjuice deception, or the real Moody’s captivity early.

entries.title: Harry becomes fourth champion only after Goblet selection

context.label: After Harry selected as fourth champion

content.fact: Harry is not a Triwizard champion until his name comes out of the Goblet; afterward he is magically bound to compete despite suspicion and hostility.
content.injection: Before the Goblet selection, do not treat Harry as a champion; after selection, enforce the contract pressure, school hostility, and forced participation.

context.label: Ron and Harry rift before first task reconciliation

content.fact: After Harry is selected, Ron doubts him and the friendship strains until the first task demonstrates the danger and they reconcile.
content.injection: During this window, write Ron and Harry as tense or estranged; before it they are not yet in this specific fight, and after reconciliation do not keep the same rift active without new cause.

content.fact: Before the graveyard ritual, Voldemort is not publicly restored to a full body and most characters do not know he is near return.
content.injection: Before Voldemort’s rebirth anchor, do not write him as an openly embodied war leader; keep his return hidden, weak, and routed through servants, dreams, and ritual setup.
